/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_fpA_intB_gemm.dir/test/test_fpA_intB_gemm.cu.o -o test_fpA_intB_gemm   -L/usr/local/cuda-12.8/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.8/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-12.8/lib64 libfpA_intB_gemm.a /usr/local/cuda-12.8/lib64/libcudart.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
